oids.name: zxAnChassisCardResetTimesClear
oids.description:
Clear the resetting times of all cards of the NE.
             When get this variable, always return 1.

oids.name: zxAnCardTable
oids.description:
This table includes the enable or disable plug and play of 
                    the Card.

oids.name: zxAnCardEntry
oids.description: An entry in zxAnCardTable.

oids.name: zxAnCardConfMainType
oids.description:
The main card type to config on the slot. Main card 
                        type indicates the category of hardware, such as 
                        64-ports adsl card,4-ports ethernet card.

oids.name: zxAnCardActualMainType
oids.description: The actually main card type on the slot.

oids.name: zxAnCardActualType
oids.description:
The actually card type on the  slot. Card type 
                        indicates the type of detailed hardware,such as ATUGA
                        and ATUGB, they'er all 32-ports Adsl card and they all 
                        provide general Adsl service,but they have different 
                        chips.
                      
           NOTE: The value of this variable MUST abide by ZTE'S  
                 discipline for card naming.And It MUST capital letters.

oids.name: zxAnCardOperStatus
oids.description:
This MIB is defined for the card status.

          inService(1)   --  card plugged in,running normally and service is 
                             being provided normally.
          notInService(2)--  card plugged in,running normally but service is 
                             stopped.
          hwOnline(3)    --  card plugged in and card communication is ok, but 
                             software isn't running now.
          hwOffline(4)   --  card is pulled out or card not plugged in, but 
                             added to agent's database only.
          configuring(5) --  card plugged in, but it is configuring.
          configFailed(6)--  card plugged in, but configuration failed.
          typeMismatch(7)--  card plugged in, but it's type is mismatch.
          deactived(8)   --  card plugged in, but it is deactivated by a 
                             manager.
          faulty(9)      --  fault occurs when card is running normally
          invalid(10)    --  invalid card instance, such as adding card failed.
          noPower(11)    --  power card plugged in, but no power input.
          unauthorized(12) --  card plugged in, but it's bugsell and the 
                               software of the card doesn't run now.
                               It is not supported by C600 series NE.
          adminDown(13)    --  card plugged in, running normally, but the 
                               administrative status of the card is deactived.
          powerSaving(34)  --  card plugged in, but it's power saving status.

oids.name: zxAnCardAdminStatus
oids.description:
This MIB is defined for the card admin status on the 
                         card. For example:reset(1),switch(2)
                         
                         reset(1)    -- reset the card.
                         switch(2)   -- switch card between master and slave
                                        status.
                         stopService(3) -- stop service normally.
                         active(4)   -- activate this card and enable the 
                                        service.
                         deactive(5) -- deactivate this card and disable the 
                                        service forcedly.

oids.name: zxAnCardPortNums
oids.description:
The numbers of physical port which contained 
                        in this board.
                        If the board has no this attribute,it should be 0.

oids.name: zxAnCardActivePortNums
oids.description:
The numbers of actived physical port which contained 
                        in this board.
                        If the board has no this attribute,it should be 0.

oids.name: zxAnCardCpuLoad
oids.description:
The current CPU load of this board.If this board has
                        more than one CPU,the average value is allowed.
                        If the board has no this attribute,it should be 0.

oids.name: zxAnCardCpuLoadThreshold
oids.description:
The CPU load threshold of this board.When 
                        zxAnCardCpuLoad  is  higher than 
                        zxAnCardCpuLoadThreshold,zxAnChassisCardCpuOverloadAlm 
                        trap should be generated by agent.

oids.name: zxAnCardMemUsage
oids.description:
The current memory usage of this board.
                        If the board has no this attribute,it should be 0.

oids.name: zxAnCardMemUsageThreshold
oids.description:
The memory usage threshold of this board. When 
                        zxAnCardMemUsage is higher than 
                        zxAnCardMemUsageThreshold,zxAnChassisCardMemOverloadAlm
                        trap should be generated by agent.

oids.name: zxAnCardStandbyStatus
oids.description: The card operation status on the card.

oids.name: zxAnCardInvSn
oids.description:
The serial number of this card.
                        it is used by inventroy management.

oids.name: zxAnCardCleiCode
oids.description:
The CLEI code of this card.
                        it is used by inventroy management.Please reference 
                        http://www.commonlanguage.com to get knowledge about
                        CLEI code.

oids.name: zxAnCardAccessoriesType
oids.description:
The accessories type of this card, such as splitter 
                        of DSLAM,the value of this variable should be the type 
                        of hardware, eg. PNVTA,PNVNP,PNVNA of ZXDSL9800's 
                        splitter.

oids.name: zxAnCardAccessoriesOperStatus
oids.description: The operational status of the card accessories.

oids.name: zxAnCardMemSize
oids.description:
The current memory size of this board.
                    If the board has no this attribute,it should be 0.

oids.name: zxAnCardAvailableStorageSize
oids.description:
The available storage space size in this card.
            For Non-C600 series, the units of this object is bytes.
            For C600 series, the units of this object is kbytes.

oids.name: zxAnCardTotalStorageSize
oids.description:
The total storage space size in this card.
            For Non-C600 series, the units of this object is bytes.
            For C600 series, the units of this object is kbytes.

oids.name: zxAnCardHardwareVersion
oids.description: The hard version in this card.

oids.name: zxAnCardPowerSavingEnable
oids.description: Enable or disable the power saving of the card.

oids.name: zxAnCardLastStartupTime
oids.description: The last startup time of the card.

oids.name: zxAnCardCpldVersion
oids.description: The CPLD version in this card.

oids.name: zxAnCardFirmwareVersion
oids.description: The firmware version in this card.

oids.name: zxAnCardOtherFirmwareVersions
oids.description: The other firmware versions in this card.

oids.name: zxAnCardManufacturingCode
oids.description: The manufacturing code of the card.

oids.name: zxAnCardCpuOverloadReason
oids.description:
The CPU overloading reason.
             normal(1): value 1 means the CPU load is normal.
             tooManyNetworkPackets(2): value 2 means that the CPU is busy 
                        processing too many network packets.
             performanceCollectionTasksBusy(3): value 3 means that the CPU is 
                        busy processing the performance collection tasks.
             otherTasksBusy(255): value 255 means that the CPU is busy 
                        processing other tasks.

oids.name: zxAnCardMcuVersion
oids.description: The MCU version in this card.

oids.name: zxAnCardBootwareVersion
oids.description: The bootware version in this card.

oids.name: zxAnCardPn
oids.description: The part number of the card.

oids.name: zxAnCardLastResetReason
oids.description: The card last reset reason.

oids.name: zxAnCardCpuInfo
oids.description:
The CPU information of the card.
                         Empty string means the card has no this attribute.

oids.name: zxAnCardChipsetType
oids.description: The chipset type of the card.

oids.name: zxAnCardChipsetInfo
oids.description:
The chipset information of the card.
                         Empty string means the card has no this attribute.

oids.name: zxAnCardOperatorCode
oids.description:
The operator code of the card.
                         Empty string means the attribute of the card is 
                         unconfigured.

oids.name: zxAnCardSubCardName
oids.description: The clock sub card on main board.

oids.name: zxAnCardResetTimes
oids.description: The resetting times of the card.

oids.name: zxAnCardResetTimesClear
oids.description:
Clear the resetting times of the card.
             When get this variable, always return 1.

oids.name: zxAnCardName
oids.description: The name of the card.

oids.name: zxAnCardMachineId
oids.description: The machine ID of the card.

oids.name: zxAnCardRowStatus
oids.description:
The status of this conceptual row.

                        To create a row in this table, a manager must
                        set this object to createAndGo(4).
                       
                        In particular, a newly created row cannot be created
                        until the corresponding zxAnExampleFunc2Xxx1Var1
                        and zxAnExampleFunc2Xxx1Var2 have been set.
                        
                        To delete a row in this table, a manager must
                        sets this object to destroy(6).

oids.name: zxAnCardHisMinPerfTable
oids.description:
The 5 minutes or 15 minutes interval performance data table of 
              card.

oids.description:
The 5 minutes or 15 minutes interval performance data entry of 
             card.

oids.name: zxAnCardHisMinIntervalNo
oids.description:
The performance data interval number. 
              1 means the the most recent previous interval;
              If the performance collection interval is 5 minutes, intervals 
              2..288 are optional.
              If the performance collection interval is 15 minutes, intervals 
              2..96 are optional.

oids.description: Performance data validity.

oids.name: zxAnCardHisMinDateTime
oids.description:
The 5 minutes or 15 minutes interval performance data generation 
              time.

oids.name: zxAnCardHisMinCpuLoad
oids.description:
The average CPU load of this card in the historical 5 minutes or
              15 minutes. If the card has no this attribute, it should be 0.

oids.name: zxAnCardHisMinMemUsage
oids.description:
The average memory usage of this card in the historical 5 minutes 
             or 15 minutes. If the card has no this attribute, it should be 0.

oids.description: The card blade table.

oids.description: An entry in zxAnCardBladeTable.

oids.description: The administrative status of the card blade.

oids.name: zxAnCardBladeOperStatus

oids.description: The IPv4 gateway of the card blade.

oids.description: The IPv6 address of the card blade.

oids.description: The IPv6 gateway of the card blade.

oids.name: zxAnEnvCardShutdownReason
oids.description:
The alarm reason of zxAnEnvCardShutdownAlm.
            envHighTemperature(1): Environment temperature is too high.
            cardHighTemperature(2):Card self temperature is too high.
            chipHighTemperature(3):Card's chip temperature is too high.
            emergencyPowerSaving(4):Emergency power saving action has been 
            taken caused by AC power failure.

oids.name: zxAnCardEnvParamTable
oids.description: This table includes card temperature information.

oids.name: zxAnCardEnvParamEntry
oids.description: The entry of zxAnCardEnvParamTable.

oids.name: zxAnCardTemp
oids.description:
The current temperature of the card environment.                 
                
                 NOTE: 
                 1. In current system, only certain cards support 
                    temperature-reading, such as SCXL, GTGOD cards.
                 2. If the card is not configured, we cannot get its 
                    temperature.
                 3. For the configured but not support temperature-reading 
                    cards, we use -1000 as an invalid temperature value to note
                    its temperature.

oids.name: zxAnCardPowerConsumption
oids.description:
Power consumption of the card.
             Value 0 means not available.

oids.name: zxAnCardCurrent
oids.description:
Current of the card.
             Value 0 means not available.

oids.name: zxAnCardCriticalTempAlmThreshold
oids.description: The critical temperature alarm threshold of the card.

oids.name: zxAnCardOptHighestTemp
oids.description: The highest temperature of the optical modules in the card.

oids.name: zxAnCardOptCriticalTempAlmThresh
oids.description: The critical optical temperature alarm threshold.

oids.name: zxAnCardOptHighestTempPortNo
oids.description:
The port No. which the optical module is located at, and the 
             optical module has the highest temperature.

oids.name: zxAnCardHeatRadiationAlmThresh
oids.description: The heat radiation abnormal alarm threshold of the card.

oids.name: zxAnCardTempHighAccuracy
oids.description: The high accuracy value of zxAnCardTemp.

The 15 minutes interval performance data table of card 
             temperature.

The 15 minutes interval performance data entry of card 
            temperature.

oids.name: zxAnCardEnvHis15MinIntervalNo
oids.description:
Performance data interval number 1 is the the most recent

              Intervals 2..96 are optional.

oids.name: zxAnCardEnvHis15MinTemp

              Intervals 2..7 are optional.

oids.description: The 1 day interval performance data generation time.

oids.name: zxAnCardEnvHis1DayTemp

oids.description: Card overheat protection table.

oids.description: Card overheat protection entry.

oids.name: zxAnEnvCardCriticalTempProtectEn
oids.description:
Enables or disables the card critical temperature protection 
            function. If it is enabled, the card will be stopped when the card 
            temperature is higher than the card critical temperature.

oids.name: zxAnCardEnvHisMinPerfTable
oids.description:
The 5 minutes or 15 minutes interval environmental monitoring
              performance data table of card.

oids.name: zxAnCardEnvHisMinPerfEntry
oids.description:
The 5 minutes or 15 minutes interval environmental monitoring 
             performance data entry of card.

oids.name: zxAnCardEnvHMinIntervalNo
oids.description:
The performance data interval number. 
              1 means the the most recent previous interval;
              If the performance collection interval is 5 minutes, intervals 
              2..288 are optional.
              If the performance collection interval is 15 minutes, intervals 
              2..96 are optional.

oids.name: zxAnCardEnvHMinIntervalValidData
oids.description: Performance data validity.

oids.name: zxAnCardEnvHMinDateTime
oids.description:
The 5 minutes or 15 minutes interval performance data generation 
              time.

oids.name: zxAnCardEnvHMinTemperature
oids.description:
The average temperature of card in the historical 5 minutes or
             15 minutes. 
             If the card does not have this attribute, it should be -1000.

oids.name: zxAnCardEnvHMinPowerConsumption
oids.description:
The average power consumption of card in the historical 5 minutes 
             or  15 minutes.
             If the card does not have this attribute, it should be 0.

oids.name: zxAnFanTrayAutoSwitchByCardUp
oids.description:
Enable/disable fan auto switch with card installation. If it is
            enabled, the fan under the card should be switched to running 
            status when the card is installed. Otherwise, the fan should be 
            shutdown.

oids.name: zxAnSwManualUpdateSubcardList
oids.description:
The subcard number. updating version file from MP to subcard.
            They can be updated in batch. For example: '1,2,3'
            This variable must comply with the multi-variables 
            binding rule described in zxAnSwManualUpdateRack.
            If zxAnSwManualUpdateSlotList is '1,2' and 
            zxAnSwManualUpdateSubcardList is '3,4', the actual operation object
            like 'slot.subcard' is '1.3', '1.4', '2.3', '2.4'.

oids.name: zxAnSwSubcardMUpdateStatusTable
oids.description:
This table includes the subcard software updating status 
            information.

oids.name: zxAnSwSubcardMUpdateStatusEntry
oids.description: An entry in zxAnSwSubcardMUpdateStatusTable.

oids.name: zxAnSwSubcardMUpdateSoftwareType
oids.description:
The software type when updating subcard software.
            bootware(1): update bootware.

oids.name: zxAnSwSubcardMUpdateStatus
oids.description:
The updating status when updating subcard software.
            negotiating(1): negotiating not starting.
            downloading(2): updating from MP.
            failed(3): update failed.
            success(4): update successfully.
            sameVersion(5): not need to update.

oids.name: zxAnSwSubcardMUpdateFailedReason
oids.description:
The reason when updating subcard software failed.
            noError(1): no error.
            noSupportCardHwVersion(2): control card doesn't support the 
            current card hardware version.
            mismatchCardHwVersion(3): control card's configuration and the
            current card hardware version are mismatch.
            mismatchCardConfData(4): control card's configuration and the
            current card configuration data are mismatch.
            noSwInNe(5): software for this card doesn't exist in control card.
            cardUpdateSwFailed(6): the current card software update failed.

oids.name: zxAnSwCardPatchRunStatusTable
oids.description:
This table includes the patch running status information of the 
             card.

oids.name: zxAnSwCardPatchRunStatusEntry
oids.description: An entry in zxAnSwCardPatchRunStatusTable.

oids.name: zxAnSwCardPatchName
oids.description: The patch file name of the card.

oids.name: zxAnSwCardPatchOwnerSwVersion
oids.description: The software version of the patch belonging to.

oids.name: zxAnSwCardPatchVersion
oids.description: The version tag of the patch.

oids.name: zxAnSwCardPatchSize
oids.description: The patch file length.

oids.name: zxAnSwCardPatchBuildTime
oids.description:
The time of patch build. For example:
                       yyyy-mm-dd HH:MM:SS.(2001-01-01 02:22:33).

oids.name: zxAnSwCardPatchActivatedTime
oids.description:
The time of the patch activated. For example:
                       yyyy-mm-dd HH:MM:SS.(2001-01-01 02:22:33).

oids.name: zxAnSwCardPatchDescription
oids.description: The patch description.

oids.name: zxAnSwCardPatchRunningStatus
oids.description:
The patch running status.
             activatingSucceeded(1) : value 1 means the activating operation 
                                      of the patch file is succeeded.
             activatingFailed(2)    : value 2 means the activating operation 
                                      of the patch file is failed.
             waitingToBeActivated(3): value 3 means the patch file is waiting 
                                      to be activated.
             resettingCardNeeded(4) : value 4 means the patch file has been 
                                      successfully activated and the card 
                                      needs to be reset.
             mismatched(5)          : value 5 means the version of the patch 
                                      file is not matched with the version of
                                      the card software.

oids.description: This table includes the subcard patch information.

oids.description: An entry in zxAnSwSubcardRunningPatchTable.

oids.name: zxAnSwPatchSubcardSlot
oids.description: The slot number of the subcard.

oids.name: zxAnSwSubcardPatchName
oids.description: The file name of the patch

oids.name: zxAnSwSubcardPatchOwnerSwVersion
oids.description: The software version of the patch belonging to.

oids.name: zxAnSwSubcardPatchVersion
oids.description: The version tag of the patch.

oids.name: zxAnSwSubcardPatchSize
oids.description: The patch file length.

oids.name: zxAnSwSubcardPatchBuildTime
oids.description:
The time of patch build. For example:
                       yyyy-mm-dd HH:MM:SS.(2001-01-01 02:22:33).

oids.name: zxAnSwSubcardPatchActivatedTime
oids.description:
The time of the patch activated. For example:
                       yyyy-mm-dd HH:MM:SS.(2001-01-01 02:22:33).

oids.name: zxAnSwSubcardPatchDescription
oids.description: The patch description.

oids.name: zxAnSwPatchPkgFileNeedResetCard
oids.description:
Whether the card needs to be reset.
             yes(1) : value 1 means need to reset the card.
             no(2) :  value 2 means no need to reset the card.
